300.prompt: Start with this detail: It is neither fully one thing nor another. Which idea gives the best comparison?

Rites of passage
Liminal aesthetics online
300.visibleConnection: The question starts from a concrete detail in Liminality: It is neither fully one thing nor another. It is really asking which answer handles a similar pressure. Liminal spaces in architecture is the best connection because it makes transition physical: corridors, hotels, stations, and waiting rooms hold people without fully belonging to anyone. Both ideas ask alpacas to notice that In-between states are powerful because they remove the old label before the new one fully holds.
